name: medprep-test-automation
description: Repository-local Playwright and quality automation for MedPrep

scripts.test:all: npm run test:quality && npm run test:django && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:quality: python3 -m ruff check medprep/settings_test.py medprep/settings_playwright.py core/management/commands/seed_test_environment.py tests/automated && python3 -m compileall core staff medprep tests/automated && python3 manage.py check --settings=medprep.settings_test && node --check playwright.config.js && node --check playwright/tests/public-smoke.spec.js && node --check playwright/tests/student-flows.spec.js && node --check playwright/tests/staff-smoke.spec.js
